title: As Suwayq Heat Wave
lead: As Suwayq is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.66. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in As Suwayq has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 11.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 17%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is at 1.4 km/h, providing little relief. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under significant stress due to this heat wave, with zero Heating Degree Days (HDD) and a high CDD value.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to protect residents and infrastructure.
